description_long: This street light features a tall, slender pole with a subtle fluted texture, culminating in a wide, rounded base for stability. At the top, a cylindrical lamp head with a frosted or opaque diffuser is capped by a flat, slightly domed lid, giving it a modern yet understated appearance. The lamp head is proportionally large compared to the pole, suggesting a focus on broad, even illumination. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the pole and base, with a translucent plastic or glass section for the lamp diffuser. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments on the pole or lamp head. This type of street light is commonly found in urban parks, sidewalks, or residential neighborhoods, providing functional and ambient lighting.
description: A tall, modern street light with a fluted metal pole and a cylindrical lamp head featuring a frosted diffuser and flat cap. The design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, fluted pole, wide base, and the cylindrical lamp head with a flat top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the same features as the front, with the cylindrical lamp head and fluted pole clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the uniformity and symmetry of the lamp head and pole.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring the features seen in view 1, with no additional details visible.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Cylindrical, modern-style lamp head with a frosted or opaque diffuser and a flat, slightly domed cap; no visible decorative elements.
